secrets.description: Usernode address (ut1…) that submission fees are paid to — the Community Fund Reserve (may be a burn address). When unset, the submit-a-dapp flow is disabled. Public on-chain address.
One-time fee in tokens required to submit a dapp. A confirmed transfer must carry amount >= this value.
Hours an unpaid submission stays in 'awaiting_payment' before being swept to 'expired'. A genuine late payment is still credited.
Micro-blog feed: points awarded to the author for each post. Public tuning value.
Micro-blog feed: points awarded to a post's author for each like it receives from another user (self-likes award none). Public tuning value.
Micro-blog feed: points required to mint 1 simulated in-app token when converting. Public tuning value.
Micro-blog feed: maximum characters allowed per post. Public tuning value.
